header_placement.footprint: tap_header_2x08_254 (2x8 2.54mm shrouded box header (Wurth WR-BHD 61201621621 class))

placement_rule: deterministic debug-placement rule v1 (WO-125): tap header at (5.0, 7.5)mm from the board-outline origin corner, rotation 0, top side; test point for channel N at (5.0 + N*2.54, 2.5)mm, top side; silkscreen channel label 1.0mm below each test point. A placement decision declared by the toolchain, not a verified geometry claim; refined by a real placer when one lands.

silkscreen_rendering.note: channel-label DATA only (silkscreen_labels); the silkscreen renderer lands in WO-124 (in flight in parallel) -- named cross-WO handoff, ledgered in the WO-125 close-out
